reviews.review_title: Survive for a Meownit' or Two
reviews.review_description:
I want to start by saying this game actually has a better presence/view area of the game than Vampire Survivors in VR. Very surprising this dev came out of the gate already getting a 1-up on the big dog in the genre!

I've played a lot of Bullet Heaven/Survivor-likes over the past few years, and this one is pretty good! As a lover of cats, this was a cute little spin on the genre; the portrait art for characters when speaking are really, really well done!

I will say though that it could use a few extra UI touches in VR. Menus are a little finicky and not really clear on how you should exit them once you're "stuck" on them in the lobby when selecting a character or upgrade, and-- at least my particular colorblindness- I sometimes found it difficult to see the XP orbs to pickup during the daytime. I will say this particular issue can't be blamed on the developer, my eyes are just bad.

 I think having the quest controllers/hand tracking appear in the lobby to select options, and during pauses, could help with this issue instead of locking your character up against the wall menu while you flick through it, though I'm no dev and certainly imagine it is not as easy as just snapping your fingers to make it happen.

Another issue I think could help is an optional UI toggle, showing an arrow of some sort under your character of where your aimed shot will land, as sometimes the manual aim weapon just wasn't aiming where I know I was pointing with the right stick. I don't know if this was just me, but having an arrow showing where you shot will land will at least help decipher that.

Still, a very fun Survivors-like. If you the genre, and you like cats, this is a no brainer!
I’ve been waiting for this one!  Really fun game!  🫠🤙

developer_response.body: Thanks for the support and the awesome rating! 🤙 So happy to hear you're enjoying it. Have fun surviving those waves! 🐈‍⬛🚀
